entry.title: Error AC770, derived area 3 in chart of depreciation x requires at least two base depreciation area
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to create new depreciation area , so I just enter OADB code and copy the existing one and create but while I trying to saving to generate transport request , it gives me error for other  depreciation area that 

"The derived area 31 in chart of depreciation XYZ requires at least two base depreciation areas."

until resolved  issue system don't allow me to create new depreciation area.

please provide suggestion

entry.title: BAS learning journey 'Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in ...'
entry.content:
Going through the CAP-Development learning journey, on the step of 'Using Databases', at the part where initializing data using the command 'cds add data' and this error occurs.

user: cap-development-learning-journey $ cds add data
Adding feature 'data'...
Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in 'com.sap.learning.Books:price'
Skipping db/data/com.sap.learning-Authors.csv
Skipping db/data/com.sap.learning-Books.csv

Successfully added features to your project.

The csv files are generated, but with no Price columns. Is that correct?

entry.title: Re: BAS learning journey 'Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in ...'
entry.content: This is the model file: namespace com.sap.learning; type Genre : Integer enum { fiction = 1; non_fiction = 2; } type NoOfBooks : Integer; type Price { amount : Decimal; currency : String(3); } entity Books { key ID : UUID; title : String(255); genre : Genre; publCountry : String(3); stock : NoOfBooks; price : Price; isHardcover : Boolean; } entity Authors { key ID : UUID; name : String(100); dateOfBirth : Date; dateOfDeath : Date; }

entry.title: Re: How to assign particular user to app variant
entry.content:
Hello,

You can create an app variant and assign this variant to a Business Catalog. Then, you can use this Catalog to create a specific Business Role that should be assigned to the specific users. 

You can check SAP Help Portal | Publishing App Variants. 

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: BAS learning journey 'Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in ...'
entry.content: and the sql preview: CREATE TABLE com_sap_learning_Books ( ID NVARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, title NVARCHAR(255), genre INTEGER, publCountry NVARCHAR(3), stock INTEGER, price_amount DECIMAL, price_currency NVARCHAR(3), isHardcover BOOLEAN, PRIMARY KEY(ID) ); CREATE TABLE com_sap_learning_Authors ( ID NVARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, name NVARCHAR(100), dateOfBirth DATE_TEXT, dateOfDeath DATE_TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(ID) );

entry.title: Re: Mexico Einvoice CFDI V 4.0
entry.content: We got incorrect information from PAC counterparts. CFDI tag gets updates in the response structure. The Einvoice generated from SAP has n5 tag.

entry.title: Re: How to add a custom tile from the Service Binding the...
entry.content: Hello! It's necessary to have access to SAP BAS. You can have the developer user and the other end users will be able to access the app inside S4HC.

entry.title: Documentation on SD Master contract through Sales order release (ECC)
entry.content:
I'm trying to find some good documentation that allows me to create a master contract and then release contracts from that and then create Sales orders form that. How they are created and how they connect to each other and how they are used in MRP.

Im looking for an ECC application and not S/4.

entry.title: ID giới thiệu Binance là gì? C15HJGN1
entry.content:
Trao đổi tiền điện tử

Binance

ID giới thiệu

C15HJGN1

Phần thưởng chào mừng

600 USDT + 40% giảm giá

Giảm phí

%20

quà

600 USDT

Mã giới thiệu Binance của bạn được ghi là C15HJGN1. Khi đăng ký trên sàn giao dịch Binance bằng mã này, bạn cần viết C15HJGN1 vào trường "ID giới thiệu" hoặc "Mã giới thiệu". Mã này có giá trị trọn đời và giảm giá hoa hồng 20% ​​khi giao dịch trên Binance.

entry.title: Re: Tax indicator 0 is not defined for use with condition...
entry.content:
Hello. I also have similar issue. The reason behind this issue is before entering condiion record for tax you should assign tax imdicator to your tax type. How ever in public cloud we cannot do relevant customising because before assigning tax indicator we have to customize public version of ovk1 but this step is not allowed. After that we should assign tax indicator to tax then we can use tax indicator with tax type. For this reason I have opened a feature request but to be accepted we Ned ay least 10 votes.  Here is the link: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/324204

You can check and if this would help please press vote  SAP to take this topic into account and relevant customizing to public cloud

 

Thanks

entry.title: Código de indicação da Binance: N09LK1K8 - ID de indicação 2024
entry.content: Para se beneficiar das menores taxas de comissão em transações de compra e venda de criptomoedas com o código de indicação da Binance 2024, os usuários da Binance podem ganhar reembolsos de taxas de transação vitalícias em todas as transações usando o código “N09LK1K8” ou ID de indicação; Você pode obter um bônus de registro de até US$ 600 realizando transações no centro de tarefas.

entry.title: Kód doporučení Binance: N09LK1K8 - 2024 ID doporučení
entry.content: Aby uživatelé Binance mohli těžit z nejnižších sazeb provizí v transakcích nákupu a prodeje kryptoměny s referenčním kódem Binance 2024, mohou získat doživotní refundaci transakčních poplatků u všech transakcí pomocí kódu "N09LK1K8" nebo ID doporučení; Prováděním transakcí v centru úloh můžete získat až 600 $ registrační bonus.

entry.title: Re: From A to Z: Setup a Starter System of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Hi @1028_melle, 

Sorry for the late response as I was on vacation. Have you got the issue resolved? 

From your description, it seems you are doing right. In this case, I'd advise to open a case with our Support team to get further analysis of the issue.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Binance (Türkiye) Referans Kodu: N09LK1K8
entry.content: Binance (Türkiye) referans kodu ile kripto para alım satım işlemlerinde en düşük komisyon oranlarından yararlanmak için, Binance kullanıcıları “N09LK1K8” kodunu veya referans kimliğini kullanarak tüm işlemlerde ömür boyu işlem ücreti iadesi kazanabilirler; Görev merkezinde işlem yaparak 600$'a kadar kayıt bonusu alabilirsiniz.

entry.title: Binance (TR) Referans Kodu Nedir?
entry.content: 2024 yılında Binance (TR) referans kodu C15HJGN1 olarak belirlendi. Bu kod %20 komisyon indirimi ve 600$ kayıt bonusu içerir. Ayrıca ömür boyu %20 komisyon indirimi kazanırsınız. Binance global borsası için C15HJGN1 kodu ile kayıt olun.

entry.content: is it possible to set global layout?

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: Failed to loa...
entry.content:
Hello Wouter, I notice my approuter instance, for instance propagate my user, but my service instance being not done. I'm trying to connect approuter instance by destination, it cloud not work. My context is that I build my CAP and UI5 apps separate. Moreover I connect these apps using OAuth2ClientCredentials throught destination using the url povides from Approuter instance but it returns 401 when i test my destination. When I use url provides from service instance the conenction is work, but no propagate my user.

Service Instance destination

It returns entities.

testing url provide from instance return 401.

Approuter Instance destination

No load nothing.

testing url provide from instance return data.

 

 

 

 

Do you have any idea to connect CAP and UI5 by separate using destitination?

entry.title: Re: Introducing new type of Data Access Control "Operator and Value" for SAP Datasphere
entry.content: Great blog introducing the updated DAC object.

entry.title: Re: Change currency in SAP S/4HANA report S_ALR_87013019
entry.content: Thanks

entry.title: Re: product master categorization - Classification
entry.content:
Hi @luirojas 

 

You could create characteristics for  Brands, Families, Sub Families, Lines and Sub lines  in the app

'Manage Characteristics'

Assign the characteristics to a class ( of class type 001 ) in 'Manage Classes' and then in the app

'Manage Product Master Data' assign this class to the products involved.

 

Now you can classify each product under the 4 different characteristics

 

In the app 'Find Objects in Classes' you can input values for these characteristics and find products

that have this criteria maintained

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Storing Employee Diversity & Equity Data without Employee Central
entry.content:
Hello,

We are currently collecting Diversity, Equity & Inclusion data from our applicants (on the application) and our employees (in custom portlets in the People Profile). We are looking to determine if there's an alternative to custom portlets for the employee data. Our questions include Gender Identity, Indigenous Community, Visible Minority, and Ethnicity.

Where are other companies (who don't have Employee Central) storing this data?

Thanks!

entry.title: Delivery Line Item Deletion Validation in VL02N
entry.content:
Hi,

I have used the user exit (MV50AFZ1) for VL02N line item deletion validation. When I delete the line item and save, it throws an error. It works fine, but when I press back, a duplicate line item comes up. please help.

entry.title: Re: Difference in output from CR vs CR Runtime
entry.content: Just a note that Report Runner supports ALL/ANY Crystal runtime engine a user wants to use. It ships with SP20, because that's a very stable release that will only help users using a SP less than that, but won't override someone using a later SP. Installing the "latest" release will break a LOT of systems that are dependent on specific service packs.

entry.title: Where are Tcode that are deprecated in S/4 and a new one that added to S/4 HANA?

Thanks-

entry.title: Configure SAP to run actions (Lansweeper issue)
entry.content:
SAP is a Chromium-based web browser. Lansweeper has a Chromium extension that can be installed in browsers like Edge to allow for the execution of asset and user actions. As Lansweeper's Chromium extension is offered through the Chrome Web Store, you must first configure Edge to allow extensions from this store.

Site:
https://community.lansweeper.com/
https://community.lansweeper.com/t5/product-discussions/bd-p/ProductConversations
https://community.lansweeper.com/t5/general-discussions/bd-p/Lansweeper_General_Forum

Thanks-

entry.title: COPA Allocation after Operating Concern links with Company Code
entry.content:
Hi Expert, 

our customer has been configured the Operating Concern but never linked with a Company Code. Now it wants to start to use COPA so we are going to link the Operating Concern with the existent Company Code. 

The question is, if we will go to activate today the link and we will go to configure the system with COPA Allocation Cycle and creating a PA Transfer Structure from WBS to PSG, we will be able to allocate in COPA also the costs and revenues occurred before our setting (for example February, March revenue and costs)?

Thanks in advance for reply

Armando

entry.title: ID de parrainage Binance: V6DOM2VV
entry.content:
L'ID de parrainage Binance « V6DOM2VV » est un outil essentiel pour les utilisateurs de la plus grande plateforme de crypto-monnaie au monde qui souhaitent mieux contrôler leurs transactions et obtenir un enregistrement détaillé de leurs mouvements. Dans la bourse Binance, le code de parrainage et l'ID de parrainage ont la même signification.

Actuellement, l'ID de parrainage Binance est utilisé comme « V6DOM2VV ». Il s'agit de l'ID de parrainage Binance le plus utilisé au monde, valable à vie, avec un taux de remise de commission de 20 %.

Avantage concurrentiel

Les bourses de crypto-monnaie ont mis en place des programmes de parrainage et d'affiliation afin d'attirer de nouveaux investisseurs. Depuis que l'ID de parrainage Binance est devenu populaire sous le nom de « V6DOM2VV », vous pouvez obtenir une remise de commission à vie de 20 % et un bonus d'inscription de 600 USDT. En préparant du contenu comme ce texte, vous pouvez également tirer des revenus d'un avantage concurrentiel élevé.

Modèle de revenus de l'ID de parrainage Binance

Le modèle de revenus du code de parrainage Binance est l'une des nouvelles tendances populaires des bourses de crypto-monnaie. Les utilisateurs peuvent utiliser des codes de parrainage pour attirer de nouveaux utilisateurs sur la plateforme Binance et gagner ainsi un revenu passif.

entry.title: Re: One of the user created below variable and he mention...
entry.content:
This variable cannot be a measure because the different results of the formula are text.
Try to simplify your formula to find the problem instead of just copying all the user's work into the question-box.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Field Masking of SAP Applications
entry.content:
HI @AmitKrSingh  -

I am trying to do data masking in one of the FPM based application /PLMU/WDA_SPC_OIF in S4 HANA system. Here i need to do attribute based masking inside the properties -> vendor information..

But my custom class is not getting triggered, while for every GUI related application it is getting triggered. Is there any thing which i need to do to mask the fields. Anticipating your response.

 

Thanks ,

entry.title: Re: SAP Enable Now - Basic Properties - Additional fields?
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

It's possible to add custom attributes to the main Enable Now content objects, e.g. Simulations and Book Pages, but these are shown in a custom group that you define, not the existing Basic group.  The details of how to add the attributes is defined in the SEN300e eLearning course that is in Learning Hub.  Do you have access to Learning Hub?  If not, let me know and I will send details of what needs to be done.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: RAR revenue recognition vs Results Analysis
entry.content: Hi - Do we have any response from the experts? Thanks

entry.title: Re: Can see only a Learner view and not the admin view as...
entry.content:
Hi Joanna,

Yes, there has been a change to your SAP Enable Now user account and the User Roles that you had, e.g. Administrators, that gave you additional access have been removed.  It sounds like your user account now only has the Learners Role so all you have access to in Manager is the Learner View tab, the place to view your assigned content.  You will have to have an Enable Now Administrator at the customer restore your access by adding back the relevant User Roles, e.g. Administrators or Master Authors, in the Administration > Users screen.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Dressing up your VCAL in LMS
entry.content:
@ChrisStiles, 

Thank you for this blog! It's been very helpful.

For our Virtual events, our goal is to provide only 1 notification email AND to have the user NOT have to open an attachment to accept the addition to their calendar.  

Through help from this blog and the comments, I am down to just the one email and no attachment.  I  am, however, in the same situation as @VL1.  The received email has this information in the "body" of the email...

   Meeting Key: 
   Meeting Password:
   Session Details:
   Click on the following URL to join the online event:

We would like to add additional content as you have shown, but I can't determine what template to open to edit those contents? I have searched and can't locate the correct template to edit it. I have pasted your code into the VCAL Message box of the VLE_ENROLLMENT and VLE_EVENT_UPDATE_STUDENTS email notification templates, but there is no change in the body of the VCAL email when I then register for a course. 

I have looked in all the labels, both VLE and regular enrollment notification templates, the class registration text, everywhere mentioned in this blog and can't locate where to edit that output. 

Can you please clarify for me where template I need to be editing, and I apologize if I've missed something obvious.

Thank you.

Daron

entry.title: Bullx Access Code "t.me/BullxBetaBot?start=access_6SVZMIJBFLI" – Skip the Waiting List
entry.content: Unlock immediate access to Bullx by using the access code "t.me/BullxBetaBot?start=access_6SVZMIJBFLI." Simply copy and paste the code into the Bullx Bot, follow the instructions, and skip the waiting list. This code ensures a smoother and faster entry into the platform, allowing you to dive in without delay.

Hi I'm ahmed amin mohamed ebada 

 

I identify as a person in the below categories:

 

People in remote or underserved locations that may be not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts 

Minorities who may not have equal opportunity in their geographic 

People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. I have completed my first learning journey  configure sap successfactors ec and exploring sap successfactors solutions and exploring sap successfactors platform and I awaiting my certification attempt in sap successfactors ec

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Document Shows Book Quantity of 0...

entry.title: Re: Fiori app F1595 Stock - Multiple material, Can we display in different UOM, same like in MMBE?
entry.content: Hello Piotr, There is no standard way to achieve it. You need to build a custom report by using tables MARA, MARM, MARD etc.

entry.title: Re: product master categorization - Classification
entry.content: Hello @Enda thank for the Reply, Is it possible that one characteristic is dependent on another? That is, it shows us the subfamilies only that belong to a family?

entry.title: Re: Tables for historical changes of PM Task Lists
entry.content: hi @Vaibhav-Mishra thanks for your time responding me on that; however, that didn't work either and only shows the date that task list created and dates in August this year which my colleague and I updated task list. it is very strange. thanks, Mary

entry.title: Re: Tables for historical changes of PM Task Lists
entry.content:
hi @Vaibhav-Mishra 

unfortunately this didn't help! table CDHDR shows the date the task list created and dates that my colleague and I updated the task list as shown below!

still remains as mystery!

FYI, we upgraded the system in Feb 2024 from S4/hana 2019 to 2022; do you think that historical changes in master data don't transfer?! this is the stupid question to ask but came to my mind/

kind reagrds,

Mary

entry.title: Re: How to create a Fiori Elements App for a RAP BO with Transport Selection
entry.content: Edited: Answered by self

entry.title: Re: Tables for historical changes of PM Task Lists
entry.content: Did you check CDPOS table also? I created a Task list in my system, saved it. Afterwards, I deleted one operation. I can see entries in CDHDR and CDPOS table. I can see the operation number also. You may take help from an ABAP programmer. In ABAP there are FMs which can help you to readthe exact change in TL. You can check with FM => CHANGEDOCUMENT_READ_HEADERS and CHANGEDOCUMENT_READ_POSITIONS

entry.title: SAP RE-FX: % Share in Source Condition when the source is a sales-based rent condition
entry.content:
Hi, I have an RE-FX Contract "A" that calculates and pays sales-based rent (SBR) quarterly to landlord A. I have another RE-FX Contract "B" that is supposed to pay 10% of Contract A's quarterly SBR to landlord B.

In Contract B, I've added a condition with the standard Calculation Formula (E2), "% Share in Source Condition". I've input the required condition parameters (e.g., 10% Share, source from Contract A, assigned SBR condition from Contract A).

I don't have the access to run RESRSE settlement, so I don't currently see the 10% amount in my Contract B cashflows. I know that when I point to a non-SBR condition in the calculation formula, I will see the 10% amounts in my cash flows.

Can someone please confirm that the "% Share in Source Condition" calculation formula works for SBR conditions? For example, when Contract A is settled, the 100% SBR appears in the cash flows of Contract A, and the 10% amount appears in the cash flows of Contract B? Has anybody set this up and processed it successfully?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Configure SAP Gateway service to ignore properties from payload that are not defined
entry.content:
Odata Service payload when implemented 

ex : 

{

"VendorRegistrationRecords": [

{

"Entity1": {

},

"Entity2": {

},

}

 

Due to changes in the partner system, they started sending payloads with 2 additional entities which can not be reverted. 

{

 

How can we ignore the new entity (3 and 4 )which is not available in current SAP OData

"VendorRegistrationRecords": [

{

"Entity1": {

},

"Entity2": {

},

"Entity3": {

},

"Entity4": {

}

}


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Configure SAP Gateway service to ignore properties fr...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

It cannot be ignored, as the requester who sending OData request should know how to use the OData.
We have to remove the wrong entity, to fully work with the OData implementation.

Otherwise we have to change the OData implementation which handles the "unknon" entity.

Best regards,
James

entry.title: Re: Central Invoice Management - Request for information...
entry.content: what property values needs to be passed for ariba.applications.api.key and ariba.applications.realm.id in the Traget system in Cloud Identity

entry.title: COLUMN NAMES STRIPPING AFTER 30 CHARs when replicating SAP HANA DB as source SAP SLT
entry.content:
We are trying to replicate a SAP HANA table as a source using SAP SLT.
We have few column names that are more than 30 chars and SLT strips some of the columns and resulting in some duplicate columns. 

There are SAP Note that are solving a table name more than 30 chars but not COLUMN name. Please response if anyone has faced this issue

entry.title: Re: Finally! we have an open source LLM trained on SAP APIs and ABAP
entry.content:
@MarioDeFelipe Thanks for the info!

Generative or Regurgitative?

I had a play to see if it could generate a program using an example I already had to compare the result; It gave me an exchange between Vikram and Mathew on a similar topic:

I then adjusted the response length and the same prompt then went on to tell me how to debug an ABAP program and create an ABAP program to send an email with an attachment... both unrelated to the prompt.

*Note; I was able to find some use cases where it performed as well or better than other models. Just not code generation.

entry.title: Manual Rating - Performance Form
entry.content:
Hi PMGM Experts,

We have Performance Form with below Route Map -

Employee --> Manager --> Calibration --> Final Review --> Completed

At the Manager Step we are using Manual Rating and Calculated Rating. We have given only Read Only Permission to Manager for Manual Rating and Calculated Rating fields in the Manager Step.

In the Manager Step - Manager rates the Competency and based on that Calculated Rating gets updated in Manager Step. Manual Rating as its ready only shows as Unrated at the Manager Step  screen and when form is moved to next step i.e. Calibration Calculated Rating overwrites Manual Rating.

However if Manager during the Manager Step rates the Competency, saves the form and sends back the form to Employee due to any reason (Calculated Rating overwrites Manual Rating) . After that if employee again send the form to Manager and Manager again rates the Competency, Calculated Rating does get updated with latest value but when this form is send to next step i.e Calibration Manual Rating shows old earlier rating only NOT the latest rating based of Latest Calculated Rating.

Do we know how we can ensure Calculated Rating always overwrites Manual Rating at least till form is with Manager?

I've already reviewed https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2078763

We are using manual-rating="true" override-unrated="true" 

Any leads how to handle this scenario?

entry.title: Re: Find Technical Object : Display list issue
entry.content: Thanks Tim for your response, will raise new development request on the customer influence portal.

entry.title: Re: From A to Z: Setup a Starter System of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

Appreciate your response.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: Withholding Tax in Manage Supplier Line Items
entry.content:
Dear Steffen Riemann,

Thank you for your confirmation.

 

I now understand why it is not possible to display the withholding tax data records in the "Manage Supplier Line Items" list.

Is there another list like "Manage Supplier Line Items" that allows me to check the withholding tax data for supplier line item?

I can check the withholding tax data by checking item details, but I would like to know if there is a way to check it in a list.

 

Best regards

Ayumi

entry.title: Q)DM does not retrieve right Standard Value Key(SVK)'s parameter names from S4Hana Cloud.
entry.content:
Dear Community Members,

I currently have Digital Manufacturing TDD license and have recently integrated it with S4HANA Cloud Demo. Within the Work Centre management application of S4HANA Cloud, I have configured the Standard Value Key (SVK) and input the corresponding SVK values into the Operations of the Routing.

 

However, upon downloading the relevant order into Digital Manufacturing (DM), the parameter names for the SVK appear incorrectly, showing as "SAP_01" and similar labels. Furthermore, it seems their value is also wrong.

 

Could anyone advise on what configuration I might have missed that is causing these incorrect results?

 

+++ Additional Question+++

In addition to the issue mentioned above, I am facing another problem. I would appreciate your assistance with if possible.

In my case, when an order is downloaded from S4HANA Cloud to DM, it creates its BOM and routing in DM. So now, there are too many BOMs and routings in DM. I would like to be sure whether this situation is natural and aware why the system does like this.

++++++

 

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

 

Best regards,

Wonpyo

SAP Digital Manufacturing SAP HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: FI - Upload supllier accountting document - Cloud Public
entry.content: Hi Juan, thanks for your answer. The process we need is to post supplier provision and we use special g/l indicator in ECC. thanks

entry.title: Deconsolidation & posting change warning message - Bin not relevant
entry.content:
Hello All, 

I am currently performing a Deconsolidation task with POSC setup and in WPT i did not mention destination bin but after the decon activity the HU are moved back from work center to GR stagging area, I used /n/scwm/post to move the HU from F1 stock type to F2 by giving a destination bin

SAP throwing a warning message- " Stotr. bin assignment only relevant for posting change with Physical inventory" 

Could you please help me with this error.

entry.title: monitoring alert when specific users such as FF , DDIC or SAP* log in SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there any way to setup monitoring alert when specific users such as FF , DDIC or SAP* log into the managed SAP system .

Please advice

Regards

 

Nilanjan Ghosh 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: monitoring alert when specific users such as FF , DDI...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

In our standard template SAP ABAP 7.10 and higher, there is no metric used to monitor the logon action for user such as FF , DDIC or SAP*.

However, we deliver one standard metric/alert: User Lock Status which allows to set a list of ABAP users that are checked for their lock status in the system.

You can define multiple variants for the users you want to monitor as following:

custom metric variant: USER=FF
custom metric variant: USER=DDIC
custom metric variant: USER=SAP*

If the user got locked the status will be red then you can get alerts. If the user not locked, the rating will be green and you can also check the status in System Monitoring UI.

Please let me know if this metric meets your requirement.

Best regards,

Ava

entry.title: When SAC using Live Data Model that from HANA CLOUD notice Not authorized
entry.content:
SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP HANA Cloud 

Hello,

I have created a Live Data Model. However, when I attempt to use it in a story, I receive an error message stating that I am not authorized. What steps should I take to resolve this issue? Is there anything specific I need to do within the HANA Cloud ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How to add a custom tile from the Service Binding the...
entry.content: Hi, last week SAP s4HANA public cloud was updated version 2408 for starter environment. I managed to deploy and app to SAP S/4HANA Cloud using SAP Fiori tools running in VS Code ( using reentrance ticket from https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_FIORI_tools/17d50220bcd848aa854c9c182d65b699/78a82b6852ce4061ba0825afdb79cda6.html#create-new-system ). So I think the new 2408 update does not need BAS ?

entry.title: Custom Logic - Sales Document Item Check - Messages
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In Custom Fields Fiori app under Custom Logic, I implemented "Sales Item Check" BADI under Business Context Sales: Sales Document Item.

Purpose was to validate some Custom fields from Additional Data A tab on the Sales Order in the BADI in method CHECK_FIELDS

The way to raise an error message in this BADI method is to fill messages parameter table like below

 

append value #( messagetype = 'E' messagetext = 'Value missing for field YY1_FIELD_SDI.'  ) to messages.

 

 
The raised message then goes into VA01/VA02 log (accessed by clicking CTRL+SHIFT+F2)
 
 
The Log button on Clicking will show the error message like below

Now the issue I am facing is, even if the Error is corrected on the Item, the message in the log still remains. We can only append new message in the messages table of the BADI method but there is nothing in the documentation about how to remove an existing error message from the log

How, can we remove the message from the log once we find the error is resolved?

Best regards

entry.title: Re: PIR Consumption & Reduction Mechanism
entry.content: Great explanation!  This step-by-step guide is really useful.

entry.title: Re: AFS MRP Error
entry.content:
Hi

It was solved, we just change the selection parameter in MRP run but we didn't find actual solution, can we meet on teams or zoom to understand the process, if you have free time.

entry.title: Re: Report stories - Recruiting doesn't show in available...
entry.content: Under Reports permission ---> Create Story please check if permission is provided for Recruiting schema

entry.title: The Procurement Monthly - August 2024
entry.content:
Summary

This month we seem to have 2 main themes, Gen AI, its promise and trajectory, with the position on the annual hype cycle moving forward at a rapid pace. There may be disconnects in what these types of reports v practitioner application however with some reports stating the pace of change and adoption is a little slower due to data, and also risk aversion.

The other area is around SRM. The benefits have been made several times before, but the importance is interesting. I noted in this years Economist report the general falling of importance (I think due largely to the inflation issues still impacting many (when cash crunches come in, many other things go out!). But what’s fascinating to me is to get the suppliers view of this, and there are 2 stats which jumped out, from World CC 77% of suppliers don’t believe procurement when they talk about relationships being important, and from HICX where suppliers stated more than 10 systems are required to service a customer. It will be interesting to see how these are addressed if SRM is to deliver on its promise.

HICX Supplier Survey

Our first 2 reports look at the Buyer Seller relationship. First from HICX their study covered 1000 suppliers who supply mainly large enterprise customers. There were some very interesting findings. 48% said their most important customer could improve its communication significantly, and 31% have to log into 10 more systems to do business with them.

61% said their most important customer sends them too many information requests and 46% said their most important customer can be unpleasant to work with.

All in all, this identifies some areas about how easy some companies are to do business with as opposed to others and should give some ideas about either what goes into supplier surveys when procurement carries them out or areas to look into to see how they compare.

Speaking of which….

World CC Effective Relationship Management

This report covers some 400 organisations on both buy and sell side supplemented with interviews and discussion groups. As usual from World CC its an interesting read, and a well carried out piece of research.

According to the report there is broad consensus that effective Relationship Management and increased collaboration in B2B settings are key drivers for mutual success. 80% of suppliers and customers confirm that when Relationship Management is effectively executed, it yields substantial benefits.

In spite of clear benefits, there is a notable shortfall in the execution of Relationship Management. This is recognized by most of the buyer community and contributes to a high degree of scepticism in the supplier community, where 77% question the sincerity of customers truly wanting to collaborate.

77% - Wow. That is a concern, its basically saying 77% of suppliers don’t believe procurement when broader discussions around longevity and building the relationship is said, which ultimately leads to a lack of trust. This scepticism is driven by past experience, and it shows the work that procurement will need to do to continue to build that trust.

Its interesting that in a separate piece of research that SAP sponsored with the university of Tennessee the 5 dimensions of trust includes communication and recognising the differing viewpoints of both parties.

Some other key takeaways of the study include that 55% of respondents stated they actually carried out a voice of the supplier survey (see the HICX report for some ideas on questions to ask!) and 40% of buy side said they didn’t do any SRM activity.

CIPS Global State of Procurement

This is CIPS first global procurement study, and draws on information from 122 responses and whilst a little UK centric (45% of respondents) still some interesting findings.

Biggest spend influence areas are still the typical indirect spend with over 70% identifying Office supplies, FM, professional services, IT and MRO capital and travel as the major areas of spend influence. Interesting recruitment and contingent labour came close as well with about 65% identifying procurements involvement there.

From an operating model perspective, 68% stated that the function was either centralised or centre led, and headcount is forecasted to remain relatively static.

And as a lead into the tech section (!) 35% identified that their organisations planned to invest more in AI with 30% investing in cyber security measures.

Gartner Hype Cycle

 

This year’s hype cycle has been released and in surprising news (!) the continual rise of Gen Ai continues, in fact according to the cycle despite the hype, the plateau of productivity (the part at which it becomes mainstream and deployed fully) is achievable in 2 years.

Gartner’s Hype Cycle for Procurement and Sourcing Solutions evaluated more than 20 technologies impacting the procurement landscape in 2024. This year, many core procurement technologies, such as source-to-pay suites and supplier information management, are climbing the Slope of Enlightenment toward the Plateau of Productivity, or mainstream adoption. All of these technologies are expected to reach the plateau within two to five years.

Some notable changes including Conversational AI being identified as unable to reach the end stage as Gen AI will overtake it and deliver its use cases, and intake and orchestration being separated and identified separately on the cycle. Gartner defines orchestration “platforms are decision augmentation tools that prescribe and execute end-to-end source-to-pay process workflows to fulfill specific business outcomes” and intake as “improves end-user experience by navigating preconfigured process workflows”.

Overall, I personally think the hype cycle is a decent indicator of where broader tech deployment is heading.

Gartner Gen AI

IN the next few papers, we will look specifically at AI in procurement, especially as the hype cycle sees it as maturing within the next 2 years!

In this paper Gartner looks at the plans for use cases, benefits, and expected adoption of AI in procurement. A majority of procurement organizations have plans to implement at least one-use case of generative AI over the next 12 months. Despite concerns around data, risk, and unproven ROI, plans for pilots proceed with 15% of organizations having already implemented.

In terms of benefits the report identifiers that procurement leaders expect a 22.7% increase in productivity and 12.5% cost savings over the next 12-18 months from generative AI, with use cases planned for Sourcing and CLM, Supplier information discovery and management, and communications.

Procurement Leaders AI

Procurement leaders broadly agrees in terms of the progress made in deployment, with 53% having preliminary exploration, and just under 7% already deploying however a word of caution springs from the change with the report starting that the pace of change is slow, with many functions reporting they are being held back by problems with their data, funding and skills.

When they do change however, the benefits are lower (than Gartner’s thoughts) in terms of non-productivity, with 36% identifying no impact on effectiveness, and 56% a limited impact. The use cases differ slightly too, with Spend analysis, market intelligence and category management leading the way in terms of systems with an AI component.

AQPC RPA in Supply chain

In other non-Gen AI news now! APQC gathered insights from 310 supply chain professionals about RPA (robotic Process automation) within their supply chains and here is what they found.

Organizations are prioritizing the implementation of RPA across all areas in supply chain, 20% of sourcing and procurement organisations have already implemented with 62% likely to implement. Benefits include improved quality (61%), Improved efficiency (56%) and reduced risk (48%)

Hackett Gen AI & Operating Models

According to The Hackett Group’s analysis, Gen AI can yield a 47% reduction in procurement function costs and a 54% human productivity increase over five to seven years. With Gen AI being a driving force to rethink the operating model as this has the potential to remove manual tasks and transactional activity, freeing up resources to focus on more strategic, value-added activities.

Its this refocus, which according to Hackett makes those changes to the function costs and therefore productivity as well.

 

 

 

As always reach out to discuss more, and always happy to hear your thoughts!

entry.title: Re: Recruiting - scheduling table reports
entry.content: For the reports scheduled from report center owner of the schedule can alone download the report from "My Jobs" section, users that are added as recipients can only get the notification about the start and completion of the schedule.

entry.title: Re: Tracing call-off purchase orders negotiated savings
entry.content:
Hi,

You can use the condition supplements to add required discount conditions in the contract, so that it will be copied to call off automatically.

In ME32K, select the item and click on conditions button. Then maintain the required discount conditions. The same shall be done at header level as well.

Regards,

entry.title: Some questions about S4Core 108
entry.content:
While operating in S4Core 108, I have met some questions.
 
1.I want to transport migration project from DEV 100 to DEV 110(different clients in one system). I tried two methods but both failed.
 
   1.1 I use the method "goto - use project in different client" in LTMOM,but failed.error message is  "Project is already assigned to the current client".(already choose the development package newly created instead of $TMP)
 
   1.2 I use LTMOM to add the migration project to the TR in DEV 100,but when l try to use SCC1N to transport it to DEV110, failed. the message said "Before Export Phase Failed. Please check Log for Details"(I am sure that the migration project is fully included in the TR, and the TR is newly created and don't include other conception. Already use SM12 to check and found no table locked in username.Already use SU53 to check and found no authorization lack.)
 
 
2.Another question is about "import financial plan data". I use it to upload project cost plan instead of CJ40. but fiscal year is mandatory,then how can i upload the overall cost of project?
 
3.And i found that the fiscal year data needs to be maintained in OKEQ CO version 0,but my upload data's plan version is P01. So why is the fiscal year data controlled by version 0's configuration instead of version P01's configuration?
 
4.What' more, I also found that WBS must be marked as Statistical, then the fiacal year can be controlled by config OKEQ. If WBS not be marked as Statistical, the fiacal year can be any year and out of control.  Why does this need to be associated with WBS attributes "Statistical"?

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Strategy - End-to-end business processes deep dives - NEW eBook available
entry.content: Thank you for share such nice document!

entry.title: Re: Service and Asset Manager - notficiation type not appearing
entry.content:
Where exactly are they not appearing? Are you creating them on the client and they are not appearing on the list or are you creating them on the backend and expecting them in the client?
Please also mention the persona you are using along with the metadata version.
For the FST persona, the types are filtered using UserObjectType. Check the ServiceNotificationTypesQueryOption.js rule.
